name_cn:
💰Sunflower Yellow·20cm
New LouLou Sheepskin model, soft to the touch, comes with a detachable card holder. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear to meet various outfit needs! The new sheepskin has a coating treatment, making it more durable and glossy, making the bag look exquisite and beautiful! (Mini does not have a mirror)
Model: 821749~
Size: 20×12×5cm
